src: NVIDIA NVSHMEM is a parallel programming interface for NVIDIA GPUs based on OpenSHMEM. NVSHMEM can significantly reduce multi-process communication and coordination overheads by allowing programmers to perform one-sided communication from within CUDA kernels and on CUDA streams.
ja: NVIDIA NVSHMEMは、OpenSHMEMをベースにしたNVIDIA GPU向けの並列プログラミングインターフェース。CUDAカーネル内やCUDAストリーム上で片側通信を行えるため、マルチプロセス間の通信・調整オーバーヘッドを大幅に削減できます。
